hero.eyebrow: For makers, fabricators, and design consultancies
hero.title: Stop bleeding 5 days on every quote.
hero.subtitle: Get one in 60 seconds.
hero.description: Cotiza Studio turns CAD files, BOM links, or service scopes into priced, compliance-ready quotes — instantly. 3D printing, CNC, laser cutting, and services-mode (hourly / fixed-fee / milestone). Built for the way real shops work in Mexico and beyond.
hero.ctaSecondary: No card. No email. Real geometry analysis.

trustBar.title: Built on the MADFAM platform
trustBar.subtitle: Cotiza is one node in an integrated stack — not a standalone tool.

pains.title: The pains we kill
pains.subtitle: Not features. Pains. The kind that make you cancel meetings.

quoteTurnaround.pain: 5 days waiting for a quote from your usual shop.
quoteTurnaround.fix: 60 seconds. Same geometry, same cost model, no human in the loop.

bomExtraction.pain: An hour transcribing a BOM from an Instructables page into a spreadsheet.
bomExtraction.fix: Paste the link. We extract the BOM. We price every line.

cfdiPaperwork.pain: Mexican fabricators drowning in CFDI 4.0, complemento de pago, NOM-151 timestamps.
cfdiPaperwork.fix: Karafiel auto-stamps every order. Legally admissible from day one.

multiVendor.pain: Procurement chasing 5 vendors for 5 different quote formats.
multiVendor.fix: One spec in. Apples-to-apples comparison out. Standardized DFM notes.

designIteration.pain: Designers iterating without knowing what's manufacturable.
designIteration.fix: DFM analysis on every upload. Material substitution suggestions before you tape out.

currencyChaos.pain: Cross-border buyers seeing one price in MXN, another in USD, neither matches.
currencyChaos.fix: 30+ currencies. Geo-detected. Live rates funneled through Dhanam (RFC 0011).

stats.title: What we actually measure
stats.subtitle: No vanity metrics. No '10,000+ Happy Makers' stock copy. Real targets, with the SLO behind them.

apiLatency.label: API response time
apiLatency.context: p95 SLO. Measured continuously. Status page link below.

fullQuote.label: Full quote generation
fullQuote.context: 3D printing + laser. CNC up to 120s with full DFM.

uptime.label: Availability SLO
uptime.context: Targeted, not yet operationally verified. Live status page coming.

stats.honestyNote: We deliberately removed inflated 'thousands of users' metrics from this page on 2026-04-25. We'll replace them with real numbers when we have them.

personas.title: Who we built this for
personas.subtitle: If any of these sound like you, the platform was designed around your workflow.

fabricator.title: Mexican fabricator
fabricator.description: You run a fab shop. You can't afford to ship a job without a CFDI 4.0. Your customers want to compare price + lead time before they sign. You spend 4 hours a day quoting and another 2 in compliance paperwork.
fixes: Quote any geometry in 60s — paste a link, upload a STEP, or scope a service
CFDI auto-stamps via Karafiel the moment a quote becomes an order
NOM-151 legal admissibility timestamping built in
Dispatch fab jobs to Pravara MES with engagement linkage to your CRM
Multi-tenant: bring your own e.firma, your own emisor identity

consultant.title: Design consultant or engineering firm
consultant.tagline: You bill design hours, not just parts
consultant.description: You quote design-for-manufacturing reviews, fixture design, prototype runs, full product engineering. You bill in hours, fixed fees, and milestones. Your CRM, your invoicing, and your fab vendors don't talk to each other.
fixes: Services-mode quoting: hourly, fixed-fee, milestone — first-class billing types
Group fabrication + services quotes under one client engagement (PhyneCRM-synced)
Per-milestone invoicing fans out to Dhanam automatically
DFM analysis runs on every CAD upload — included in every services quote
Live Forgesight market pricing so your DFM advice cites real numbers

makerspace.title: Makerspace owner or service bureau
makerspace.tagline: You want your members quoting. You want a cut.
makerspace.description: You run a makerspace, a coworking-fab hybrid, or a service bureau franchise. You want to give your members instant quoting without standing up your own platform. You want to keep your branding, take a transaction fee, and stop being a help desk.
fixes: Full white-label: your domain, your branding, your customer list
Multi-tenant infrastructure: per-tenant S3 prefixes, KMS keys, audit logs
Transaction-fee collection on every order — automatic split to Dhanam
API + webhooks for everything: connect Slack, Notion, your existing CRM

diy.title: DIY maker or hobbyist
diy.tagline: Should I print this or pay someone?
diy.description: You build things. You want to know if it's cheaper to print at home, ship to a service bureau, or buy off-the-shelf. You don't want to learn five quoting tools to find out.
fixes: Free tier: 3 quotes a month, 100MB storage, no credit card
DIY-vs-pro calculator: time + machine cost + your hourly rate vs. service price
Paste an Instructables/Thingiverse link — we extract the BOM
Compare materials side-by-side before you spend a peso

linkQuote.title: Paste a link. Get a quote.
linkQuote.description: Instructables, Thingiverse, GitHub, Hackaday, Make: Magazine. Drop a URL and we'll extract the bill of materials, price every line in your currency, and tell you whether DIY or service-bureau is cheaper for your specific volume.

features.title: What's actually in the platform
features.subtitle: Cotiza is the quoting + compliance node of the MADFAM platform. Here's the surface.

fast.title: Instant multi-process quotes
fast.description: FFF/SLA 3D printing, 3-axis CNC (aluminum/steel/plastics), 2D laser cutting. One spec in, side-by-side comparison out.

services.title: Services-mode B2B billing
services.description: First-class hourly, fixed-fee, and milestone billable types. The same engine that prices a CNC part prices a 40-hour engineering review.

compliance.title: CFDI 4.0 + NOM-151 ready
compliance.description: Karafiel stamps every order automatically. Legal admissibility from day one. Per-tenant e.firma upload (Wave E, shipping).

ecosystem.title: Pre-wired ecosystem fan-out
ecosystem.description: On every order: Karafiel CFDI, Dhanam invoicing, Pravara MES dispatch, PhyneCRM engagement update, Yantra4D webhook. No glue code.

intelligence.title: Live market pricing
intelligence.description: Forgesight pricing feed runs in your DFM analysis. When aluminum 6061 spikes 12%, your quote knows before you do.

multitenant.title: Multi-tenant + white-label
multitenant.description: Row-level tenant isolation. Per-tenant S3 prefixes, KMS keys, audit trails. Bring your own brand, your own e.firma.

api.title: REST API + signed webhooks
api.description: Every quote, order, payment, CFDI event available via API and outbound webhook (HMAC-SHA256). Wire it into anything.

i18n.title: Bilingual ES / EN
i18n.description: Built MX-first. Real Spanish, not a Google-translated afterthought. 30+ currencies, geo-detected.

dfm.title: Design-for-manufacturing analysis
dfm.description: Python geometry worker analyzes every CAD upload. Material substitution. Process recommendation. Cost-reducing redesign hints.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Free for hobbyists. Pay only when the platform is making you money. Cancel anytime.

pro.name: Creator Pro
pro.description: Freelancers, solo design firms, small shops
pro.limits: 50 quotes/mo • 1GB storage • All processes • API access

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Fabricators, MES integrations, custom CFDI flows
enterprise.limits: Unlimited everything • SLA • dedicated CSM • per-tenant e.firma

pricing.salesNote: Need a 6-month trial, multi-tenant SLA, or per-tenant CFDI? Talk to us — most enterprise customers come in via a 30-minute call, not a self-serve checkout.

cta.description: Run one real quote through the platform. If it doesn't save you 4 hours by Friday, the free tier is yours forever.
cta.continueGuest: or run one quote as a guest →

footer.tagline: Manufacturing intelligence that previously cost $50K/yr. Now $0–$499/mo.
footer.ecosystem: Part of the MADFAM platform — Karafiel · Dhanam · Pravara · PhyneCRM · Forgesight
